name: FAVOURITE || Kaew Nanwidhan
description:
—waiter! waiter! a cup of your attention please!

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

ever since the incident at the photography club, being invisible was no longer an option for Kaew. but no matter how much attention she gets, she’s only got eyes for one particular girl.

…in a hidden and small restaurant, Kaew found peace. and she desperately hoped no one else finds this place too.
